conbody.p: Overview: CDS Monthly Productivity dashboard enables the CDS Managers to view the trend of various review and clarification metrics over time and analyze the performance of the individual CDSs and the overall performance of the CDS Team.

You can view the individual and detailed performance of the CDSs to analyze their activity. Under the CDS column, select a CDS, right-click, and select Drill through CDS Performance , the system navigates to the CDS Performance tab. This tab displays all the data for the selected CDS.When the CDS Performance tab appears, from the title of the tab, click CTRL + to go back to the previous tab (from the tab you have used the Drill through) command. In this case, it is CDS Monthly Productivity.
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE One Staff Management CDS Monthly Productivity .

CDS Monthly Productivity displays the following:
CDS Monthly Productivity chart
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets generated in the tabular chart.

Default Display: By default, the dashboard displays the data for the inpatient encounters discharged in the last nine calendar months. Click the ‘Reset’ button to reset the discharge date and select the required date. Total column displays the row-level grand totals for the selected period. For the percentage metrics, this column displays the overall percentage for the selected period.

row.entry: This metric displays the count of encounters reviewed.
Initial Reviews = The count of encounters with an initial review date/time.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the count of additional reviews performed for the reviewed encounters.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.
Encounters with Clarification = Count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for each CDS.

entry.p: Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED./ Count of Initial Reviews performed) *100

row.entry: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: This metric displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

row.entry: Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications = The count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.

entry.p: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
This metric displays the percentage of reviewed encounters at least one financial impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for each CDS.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED / Count of encounters with an initial review date) X 100
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

row.entry: This metric displays the average number of hours between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.

entry.p: (Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time- Admit Date/Time) hours
Avg. Initial Review TAT(Hours) = Sum of Initial Review TAT(Hours) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews)
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the 'CDS/Coder Match Rate' for every month.
CDS/Coder Match Rate = (Count of Reconciled Encounters with Match =Y / Count of Reconciled Encounters in the selected date range) *100

row.entry:
This metric displays the count of sent clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for the reviewed encounters.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications Sent= Count of sent clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for the reviewed encounters.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: This metric displays the count of sent clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.

row.entry:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
This metric displays the percentage of sent clarifications responded by the providers for each CDS.

entry.p: Provider Response Rate= (The count of overall clarifications responded by the Provider with Final Response other than Pending,Retracted or No Response/ The count of overall clarifications sent with status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for the reviewed encounters) *100

row.entry:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Only Clarifications with FINAL response are considered.
This metric displays the count of sent clarifications with Final response as Agreed.

entry.p: Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

row.entry: This metric displays the percentage of responded clarifications agreed by the providers for each CDS.

entry.p: Provider Agreed Rate= (The count of overall clarifications agreed by the Provider with Final Response as Agreed/ The count of overall clarifications responded by the Provider with Final Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) *100
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Only Clarifications with FINAL response are considered
This metric displays 'Overall Clarification Alternative Diagnosis Rate' for each month.
Out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Alternative Diagnosis".
Overall Clarifications Alternative Diagnosis Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Alternative Diagnosis/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100).

row.entry: Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation. Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

This metric displays 'Overall Clarification Other Explanation Rate' for each month.
Out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Other Explanation".
Overall Clarifications Other Explanation Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Other Explanation/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100).
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation. Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

This metric displays 'Overall Agreed Rate (Agreed , Alternative Specificity Diagnosis) for each month. Out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarifications agreed with Final response as Agreed, Alternative Diagnoses.
Overall Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed with Final response as Agreed, Alternative Diagnoses/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100).
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation. "Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.

This metric displays 'Overall Agreed Rate (Agreed , Alternative Specificity Diagnosis, Other Explanation)' for each month. Out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarifications agreed with Final response as Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Diagnoses.
Overall Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed with Final response as Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Diagnoses/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100).
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation."Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: This metric displays the Avg. Response TAT (Hours) for each month.

Avg. Response TAT (Hours) = Sum of Response TAT (Hours) of all the instances with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response/ Total count of instances Responded (with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) in hours.
Clarification Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Deleted and Retracted status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response are not considered in this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of Financial Impact clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of sent Financial Impact clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
This metric displays out of total Financial Impact Clarifications Sent, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications Responded.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Financial Impact Clarification Response Rate = ((Financial Impact Clarification Responded/ Financial Impact Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation
This metric displays the count of sent Financial Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

row.entry: Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed = Count of sent Financial Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed

entry.p: Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
This metric displays out of total Financial Impact Clarifications Responded, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = ((Financial Impact Clarification Agreed/ Financial Impact Clarification Responded) x 100)
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of Quality Impact clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of sent Quality Impact clarifications with FINAL response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
This metric displays out of total Quality Impact Clarifications Sent, the % of Quality Impact Clarifications Responded.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Quality Impact Clarification Response Rate = ((Quality Impact Clarification Responded/ Quality Impact Clarification Sent) x 100)
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of sent Quality Impact clarifications with FINAL response as Agreed.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.

row.entry: Quality Impact Clarifications Agreed = Count of sent Quality Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed

entry.p: Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

row.entry: This metric displays '% Both Impact Clarification for each month. Out of total clarifications sent, the percentage of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration.Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
% Both Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration./ Total Clarifications Sent) x 100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: This metric displays 'Both Impact Clarifications Sent' for each month.
The count of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration.
entry.note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

row.entry: Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: This metric displays 'Both Impact Clarifications Responded' for each month.

The count of sent clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration, for which has FINAL response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.
entry.note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

row.entry: Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

entry.p: This metric displays 'Both Impact Clarification Response Rate' for each month.

Out of total Clarifications Sent, the percentage of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration responded.Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

row.entry: Both Impact Clarification Response Rate = ((clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration responded./ Both Impact Clarifications Sent) x 100)Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89% or 100%
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: This metric displays 'Both Impact Clarifications Agreed' for each month.
The count of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration agreed.

This field displays the count of sent BOTH Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed.Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

row.entry: Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

entry.p: This metric displays 'Both Impact Clarification Agreed Rate' for each month.

Out of total clarifications with BOTH (financial and quality) Impact Agreed, the percentage of clarifications with BOTH (financial and quality) Impact Responded.Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
BOTH Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = ((BOTH Impact Clarification Agreed/BOTH Impact Clarification Responded) x 100)
Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89% or 100%

row.entry: Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: This metric displays out of total Quality Impact Clarifications Responded, the % of Quality Impact Clarifications Agreed.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Quality Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = ((Quality Impact Clarification Agreed/ Quality Impact Clarification Responded) x 100)
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of SEV Impact clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘SEV’ is a SEV Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of sent SEV Impact clarifications with FINAL response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘SEV’ is a SEV Impact Clarification
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
This metric displays out of total total SEV Impact Clarifications Sent, the percentage of SEV Impact Clarifications Responded
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘SEV’ is a SEV Impact Clarification.
SEV Impact Clarification Response Rate = ((SEV Impact Clarification Responded/ SEV Impact Clarification Sent) x 100)
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of sent SEV Impact clarifications with FINAL response as Agreed.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘SEV’ is a SEV Impact Clarification.
SEV Impact Clarifications Agreed = Count of sent Quality Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
This metric displays out of total SEV Impact Clarifications Responded, the percentage of SEV Impact Clarifications Agreed.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘SEV’ is a SEV Impact Clarification.
SEV Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = ((SEV Impact Clarification Agreed/ SEV Impact Clarification Responded) x 100)
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

ul.li: Displays the discharge date range here. You can select required dates from the date lookup.
With the Reset button, you can reset the admit date range.
Tooltip: Use "Ctrl + Click" to reset the Discharge Date.
Displays a list of active and inactive facilities that you have access to. The list is sorted alphabetically.
You can select multiple facilities
You can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Default: ALL
Displays a list of active and inactive payers associated with the facilities that you have access to. The list is sorted alphabetically.
You can select multiple payers
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
You can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
Format: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Default: ALL
Displays a list of active and inactive CDSs associated with the facilities you have access to.
The CDS Filter in all the reports displays the users with at-least CDS or CDS Manager role assigned.
"Unassigned CDS" displays data for the encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.
Format: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID)
Default: ALL

Displays the available patient types.
Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient
Displays the list of available units.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Unit.
Default: ALL
Displays Weekend Only Stay values (Y/N).
You can search the Weekend Only Stay.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available Admit Services.
You can select multiple Admit Services.
You can search the Admit Service.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available Visit Types.
You can select multiple visit types.
You can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL

row.entry: Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED/ Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews)) x100. E.g. 33%

Provider Response Rate =(Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed, Not Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Specificity Diagnosis, Discuss, Sent to another Provider or Unable to Determine/Count of Clarifications Sent) x100. E.g. 90%
Provider Agreed Rate =(Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed/Count of Clarifications Responded) x100. E.g. 90%
Provider Alternative Specificity Diagnosis Rate =(Count of clarifications with a Final response as Alternative Specificity Diagnosis/Count of Clarifications Responded) x100. E.g. 76%.
Provider Other Explanation Rate = (Count of clarifications with a Final response as Other Explanation/Count of Clarifications Responded) x100. E.g. 42%.
Provider Agreed Rate (Agreed & Alt DX) = (Count of Clarifications Agreed with Final response as Agreed, Alternative Diagnoses/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100). E.g. 65%.
Provider Agreed Rate (Agreed, Alt DX, Other Exp)

Provider Agreed Rate (Agreed, Alt DX, Other Exp) = (Count of Clarifications Agreed with Final response as Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Diagnoses/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100). E.g. 96%.
Financial Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED/Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) ) x 100). E.g. 30%

Financial Impact Clarification Response Rate = (Count of Financial Impact clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response./ Count of Financial Impact Clarifications Sent) X100. E.g. 75%
Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = (Count of Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as Agreed/ Count of Financial Impact Clarification Responded x 100). E.g. 90%
Quality Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration

Quality Impact Clarification Response Rate = (Count of Quality Impact Clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response / Count of Quality Impact Clarifications Sent x 100). E.g. 88%
Quality Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = (Count of Quality Impact Clarifications with Final Response as Agreed/ Count of Quality Impact Clarification Responded x 100). E.g. 100%
Both Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as 'Financial' and ‘Quality’ in the administrator configuration.

Both Impact Clarification Response Rate = (Count of Both Impact Clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response / Count of Both Impact Clarifications Sent x 100). E.g. 88%.
Both Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = (Count of Both Impact Clarifications with Final Response as Agreed/ Count of Both Impact Clarification Responded x 100). E.g. 100%.
SEV Clarifications: Clarifications with ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV.

SEV Impact Clarification Response Rate = (Count of SEV Impact Clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response / Count of SEV Impact Clarifications Sent x 100). E.g. 70%
SEV Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = (Count of SEV Impact Clarifications with Final Response as Agreed/ Count of SEV Impact Clarification Responded x 100). E.g. 98%

Avg. Initial Review TAT(Hours) = Sum of Initial Review TAT(Hours) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) ; Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time- Admit Date/Time) hours. E.g. 28
Avg. Response TAT (Hours) = Sum of Response TAT (Hours) of all the instances with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response/ Total count of instances Responded in hours. E.g. 18
CDS/Coder Match Rate = (Count of Reconciled Encounters in which Final DRG matches Possible DRG (Or Working DRG if Possible DRG is Blank) / Count of Reconciled Encounters) X100. E.g. 90%
